name: cf6001x384
drl:
rule TJ0 when $a : E0() $b : E1(this meets[20ms] $a) then end
rule TJ1 when $a : E1() $b : E1(this before[50ms,200ms] $a) then end
rule CH2 when $a : E0() $b : E1(this after[0ms,100ms] $a) $c : E2(this after[0ms,100ms] $b) then end
rule W3 when accumulate( E0(tag == "x") over window:time(100ms); $c : count() ) then end
rule J4 when $e : E0($t : tag) then insertLogical(new D($t)); end
rule RD5 salience 10 when D() then end
rule ND6 salience -3 when not D() P() then end
_finding: D-166 residual ledger (SEINE_TJUPD axis, update-heavy fuzz_cep): SET class (18 vs 19 firings) + a CH2 partner diff — the only SET-class find of the axis; own recon needed. PRE-EXISTING. The D-166 join/not cells are CLOSED (mju 0/2000); these are adjacent sub-seams flushed by the new axis - recon when scheduled. || MECHANISM CRACKED + FIX VALIDATED (D-167, SET class): a stale staged UPD on an UNLINKED temporal join fails the D-125 eligibility gate; the childless self_drain_delta permanently loses the pair across unlink/relink. Six-line fix (leave mixed staging for the eval) validated on the minimal + the FULL case (19/19) + all gates, REVERTED pending the Bryan gate. docs/tjupd-ledger-mechanisms.md §1. || GRADUATED by the D-168 SET-fix landing: stream_flush_ex's self-drain fallback now requires empty upd staging (mixed staging stays for the eval), so the unlink/relink no longer loses the pair. Mechanism D-167 §1, docs/tjupd-ledger-mechanisms.md.
